online.label: Up to 2 players online
online.description: Online play in small sessions — up to 2 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance.

online.label: Up to 3 players online
online.description: Online play in small sessions — up to 3 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance. Example: Elden Ring Nightreign.

online.label: Up to 4 players online
online.description: Online play in small sessions — up to 4 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance.

online.label: Up to 6 players online
online.description: Online play in small sessions — up to 6 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance.

online.label: Up to 8 players online
online.description: Online play in small sessions — up to 8 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance.

online.label: Up to 12 players online
online.description: Online play in medium sessions — up to 12 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance.

online.label: Up to 16 players online
online.description: Online play in medium sessions — up to 16 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance.

online.label: Up to 32 players online
online.description: Online play in large sessions — up to 32 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance.

online.label: Up to 64 players online
online.description: Online play in large sessions — up to 64 players per session. Each session is a self-contained instance. Example: Battlefield-scale matches.

online.label: Up to 100 players online
online.description: Online play in large sessions — up to 100 players per session. Common in battle royale formats.

online.label: Shared server
online.description: All players exist on the same persistent server or shared world. You encounter other players organically rather than joining a fixed session. Examples: MMOs, GTA Online, Sea of Thieves.
